overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 featuring a character with cat ears and red boots walking through Night City. The character crosses a rain-slicked street with neon billboards, walks along a sidewalk, and enters a narrow dark alley approaching a door with green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with wet multi-lane streets and neon advertisements

events.description: black sedan drives past from right to left in the background

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wet asphalt street from the center toward the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street in the background

entered.detail: large illuminated advertising screens with red and white graphics on building facades
tall glass and steel building with multiple glowing windows and signage
rain-slicked dark asphalt reflecting neon lights with painted lane markings
tall metal pole with traffic signals and attached street lighting
short black and yellow striped posts lining the curb edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks across a wide wet street in a futuristic neon-lit city at night. Large digital billboards illuminate the left side while skyscrapers rise in the distance. A black sedan drives past in the background as the character approaches the sidewalk lined with metal bollards.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit city sidewalk with commercial storefronts and street furniture

events.description: encounters a pedestrian in a yellow jacket bending over near the curb

agents.ego_description: walking along the concrete sidewalk past illuminated storefronts and advertisements

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket bending over near the street curb

entered.detail: vertical illuminated signs with Asian characters and red neon lighting
metal grid covers embedded in the sidewalk surface
large concrete or metal bins for waste disposal

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the concrete sidewalk lined with neon storefront signs and ventilation grates. The wet asphalt street remains visible to the right with occasional vehicles passing by. Near the end of the segment, the character passes a pedestrian in a yellow jacket bending near the curb.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow back alley with industrial barriers and dim artificial lighting

events.description: turns left from the main sidewalk into a narrow enclosed alleyway with concrete walls
slows down and stops in front of a metal door with green overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: turning into the narrow alley and walking toward a metal door illuminated by green neon light

entered.detail: tall plain concrete walls of adjacent buildings forming a narrow corridor
yellow and black striped construction barriers blocking part of the alley
metal industrial door with a bright green neon light fixture mounted above it
illuminated sign with orange and red lighting mounted high on the alley wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left into a narrow enclosed alleyway with high concrete walls and dim lighting. Metal construction barriers block part of the path ahead. The character walks toward a metal door at the end of the alley illuminated by a green neon light fixture, eventually slowing to a stop in front of it.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-drenched city thoroughfare into the claustrophobic confines of a dim urban alley. It begins with the character crossing a rain-slicked street illuminated by towering digital billboards and distant skyscrapers as a black sedan passes in the background. As the character reaches the sidewalk, the scene shifts to a walk past glowing storefront signs and ventilation grates, passing a pedestrian in a yellow jacket near the curb. The camera then follows the character as they turn left, leaving the open street behind to enter a narrow alleyway enclosed by high concrete walls and metal construction barriers. Finally, the environment darkens further as the character approaches and stops before a metal door bathed in a solitary green neon light.
